product.name: Pan-Seared Steak
selling_points: Product type: pan-seared steak in the food category.
A richly seared steak for an easy premium dinner, with a browned crust, juicy sliced center, and appetizing steam that makes the meal feel restaurant-quality at home.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Home-cooked steak often turns out pale and underwhelming, lacking that deep crust and sizzle that makes it feel special.
creative_strategy.promise: A richly seared steak with a browned crust and juicy, rosy center—restaurant-quality presentation and steam at home with minimal fuss.

character.appearance: Single adult home-cook hand model with clean hands and short nails; no jewelry.
character.wardrobe: Charcoal gray apron over a light neutral long-sleeve shirt; sleeves rolled to mid-forearm.
character.hair_makeup: Hair off-camera; tidy, natural look. Hands clean and dry.
character.performance_style: Calm, precise movements; confident but restrained, letting the food lead.

scene.location: Cozy home kitchen counter and stovetop area.
scene.lighting: Warm, directional side/back light to accent texture and steam; gentle highlight on crust; soft shadows.
scene.background: Softly blurred white tile backsplash, a small green plant, and a clean wooden butcher-block counter. No visible logos, packaging, or clutter.
key_props: Small ramekin of flaky sea salt

product.visual_identity: Thick-cut pan-seared steak, about 1 inch thick, with a deep mahogany-brown crust and a rosy medium-rare center when sliced. Surfaces dry and crisp, juices lightly glistening—not oily.
product.proof_prop: Cast-iron skillet for sear; wooden board and chef’s knife for a clean slice reveal; plain white plate for hero plating.

shots.visual_prompt: Vertical close-up of a matte black cast-iron skillet on a home kitchen stovetop. A pale, lightly browned steak sits in the center with almost no crust. A right hand with matte stainless tongs gently presses the steak; there is only a faint, weak sizzle and little steam. Warm kitchen lighting but the steak looks under-seared. Camera is locked off, framing medium-close on the skillet and steak. Clean countertop and backsplash softly blurred in background, no logos. Keep the action minimal and realistic.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: A single vertical still: matte black cast-iron skillet centered in frame on a clean home stove. Inside is a steak that appears lightly cooked but pale, lacking a deep crust (not raw, no red juices). A right hand holds matte stainless tongs near the steak’s edge, just about to press. Warm, directional side light; clean wooden counter and soft white tile backsplash out of focus. Very faint steam only. No smoke, no splatter, no branding.
shots.negative_prompt: raw or bloody meat, gore, excessive smoke, oil splatter, burnt or charred black crust, dirty stovetop, shaky handheld camera, jump cuts, multiple angles, reflections or glare on metal, extra fingers or deformed hands, messy backgrounds, visible brand logos, glassy or transparent cookware, exaggerated steam or cartoon effects.
shots.audio: Quiet kitchen room tone with faint, disappointing sizzle. No music yet. Subtle utensil clink; no voiceover.

shots.visual_prompt: Same kitchen and angle style, now on the wooden butcher-block. A pan-seared steak with a deep mahogany crust rests on the board, steam rising, backlit by warm side light. The hand uses a matte-finish chef’s knife to slice the steak into thick, even slices, revealing a rosy, juicy center. The hand gently fans the slices, tilting the board slightly so the crust texture and glistening interior fill the frame. Steam is clearly visible against the soft background. Clean, appetizing surfaces; no excessive juices. Camera remains locked-off; slow, controlled motion only.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: A vertical still on the wooden cutting board: a pan-seared steak with a deep brown crust rests center-frame, visible wisps of steam rising in warm backlight. A matte-finish chef’s knife is poised against the steak’s edge for the first cut; a plain white plate and a small ramekin of flaky salt sit slightly out of focus behind. Lighting warm and directional, highlighting crust texture. Clean board, no mess, no branding.
shots.negative_prompt: overcooked grey meat, raw/bloody interiors, excessive pooling juices, burnt black crust, harsh smoke, oily glare, shaky camera, montage or cuts, mirrored reflections, cluttered countertop, visible logos, unrealistic steam or CGI effects, distorted hands, glass reflections.
shots.audio: Warm, light music fades in. Knife-on-board slicing sounds and a soft steam hiss. Gentle VO (optional): "Restaurant-quality at home."
